name: 05_ticker_not_in_live_vwaps
description: Single holding whose ticker is NOT in live_vwaps -> the `if t in live_vwaps:` guard skips it entirely; both accumulators stay at 0.0.
derivation: TSLA is not a key in live_vwaps. The producer's `if t in live_vwaps:` guard fails -> the entire inner block (p, v lookups AND the alloc accumulation into valid_vwap_weight) is skipped. The holding contributes NOTHING to either accumulator. Final: (0.0, 0.0).
